chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S-47 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on MA 4644/2023 2.For orders on office objection 3.For orders on MA 4645/2023 4.For hearing of main case 08-09-2023 Applicant is called absent. ***** Applicant, who appears in person in this case, is called absent. No intimation is received. Accordingly, this Crl. Transfer Application is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. JUDGE Ahmad
